title: Quotes and Invoice widget improvement

posts.author: david.lowe (David Lowe)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hello Team, we are loving the new improved Quote and Invoice widget. The addition of the products and Product view widget is a game changer for us, thank you.
I would like the ability to remove a product line item from within the edit view of the quote or invoice.

What are you trying to achieve

I would like the ability to remove a product line item from within the edit view of the quote or invoice. This will give the ability to remove and item that was added by mistake or the invoice is in fact different to the quote, ie the customer took up or declined an option within the quote. For your consideration.
